top_stories.title: Orthrus: Memory-Efficient Parallel Token Generation via Dual-View Diffusion
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2605.12825v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce Orthrus, a simple and efficient dual-architecture framework that unifies the exact generation fidelity of autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) with the high-speed parallel token generation of diffusion models. top_stories.title: Luma opens Uni-1.1 image model API at prices and quality matching OpenAI and Google
top_stories.summary: Luma is making its Uni-1.1 image model available via API, with prices starting at $0.04 per image at 2,048-pixel resolution. On the Arena leaderboard, the model ranks third, right behind Google and OpenAI. The API includes web search, built-in reasoning, and support for up to nine reference images. top_stories.technical_takeaway: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.

top_stories.title: GridSFM: A new, small foundation model for the electric grid
top_stories.summary: Introducing GridSFM, a small foundation model that can predict AC optimal power flow in milliseconds, boosting efficiency and unlocking cost savings. Learn how GridSFM gives grid operators direct visibility into congestion, stability, and system health. The post GridSFM: A new, small foundation model for the electric grid appeared first on Microsof
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Hardware and energy constraints now shape model design decisions.
top_stories.primary_risk: Compute scaling limited by physical and energy infrastructure.

top_stories.title: Tencent plans to ramp up AI spending as China's chip supply allegedly improves
top_stories.summary: Tencent plans to significantly boost AI infrastructure spending in the second half of 2026, as Chinese chipmakers ramp up domestic AI chip production. The company also posted strong first-quarter results and is in talks for a stake in Deepseek. The article Tencent plans to ramp up AI spending as China's chip supply allegedly improves appeared
